choices.text: Student → Sport → Recreational → Private (PPL, 40 hrs min) → Commercial (250 hrs, paid) → ATP (1,500 hrs airline). Add ratings: instrument, multi, type.
Class 1 (ATP, 6-12 mo), Class 2 (Commercial, 12 mo), Class 3 (Private, 2-5 yrs). BasicMed alternative for many private pilots (4 yrs).
Instrument rating: fly through clouds + filed IFR clearance + career options. ~50 hrs flight + ~30 hrs ground. $8-15k.
3 T/L in 90 days. Night: 3 T/L full-stop at night in 90 days. IFR: 6 approaches + holds in 6 months. Flight review every 24 months.
~3-5 years: PPL (60 hrs) → Instrument → Commercial → Multi+CFI → build hours instructing → ATP (1,500) → Regional → Majors. ~$80-100k total training cost.
